Home / Media Streaming / Jellyfin

Jellyfin — open source alternative

Open source media server — stream your movies, shows and music.

Strengths

  • 100% free — no accounts, no paywalled apps.
  • Plays on virtually every platform.
  • Active plugin and skin ecosystem.

Weaknesses

  • Metadata scraping sometimes needs manual fixes.
  • Transcoding requires hardware acceleration for 4K.
  • Sharing with friends needs port-forwarding or a reverse proxy.
License: GPL-2.0 Self-host difficulty: 2/5 Self-host onlyDesktop: Windows, macOS, LinuxMobile: iOS, Android

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

Jellyfin is used as an alternative to

Netflix

Subscription video streaming.

See all alternatives →

Spotify

Music streaming and podcasts.

See all alternatives →
